message:
test(engine): synthesis budget, GC, delegation, epochs, and system subsystem enrichment

synthesis_budget.rs (+453 lines):
  Registry add/remove/override tests, budget allocation determinism,
  constraint satisfaction, and serde roundtrips for budget types.

gc.rs (+255 lines):
  GC marking and sweep invariant tests, reachability graph construction,
  deterministic collection ordering, and resource reclamation verification.

epoch_invalidation.rs (+296 lines):
  Epoch invalidation vector logic, version fence enforcement, and
  deterministic epoch transition boundary tests.

demotion_rollback.rs (+399 lines):
  Demotion trigger evaluation, rollback recovery scenarios, state machine
  transitions, and deterministic rollback path selection.

cut_line_automation.rs (+565 lines):
  Cut line determination, automation boundary detection, deterministic
  partition selection, and multi-region cut line coordination tests.

delegation_chain.rs (+566 lines):
  Delegation witness construction, chain verification, authority
  propagation, and deterministic chain linking tests.

extension_registry.rs (+161 lines):
  Registry conflict resolution, version precedence, and deterministic
  extension lookup and override behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
